title: 5 Best and Worst Performing Real Estate Stocks in Q4 2022
text: High interest rates and a looming recession could make 2023 a challenging year for commercial real estate.

title: Regency Centers Announces Tax Information for 2022 Distributions
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Jan. 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (The “Company”) (Nasdaq:REG) today announced the federal income tax treatment of its 2022 distributions to holders of its common stock.

title: Regency Centers Invites You to Join Its Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Jan. 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (The “Company”) (NASDAQ: REG) will announce its Fourth Quarter 2022 earnings results on Thursday, February 9, 2023, after the market closes. The Company's earnings release and supplemental information package will be posted on the Investor Relations section of the Company's website – investors.regencycenters.com. The Company will host an earnings conference call on Friday, February 10, 2023, at 11:00 a.m. ET.

title: The Buy-Hold-And-Go-Fishing REIT Portfolio
text: Many former landlords look to obtain income from REITs, seeking to escape the need for close monitoring or worry. This article considers sensible expectations and sensible objectives for such investments.
